title: Code Geass Crystal PvP + Anime Sky
description: This PvP/CPvP resource pack replaces the model textures, sounds, GUI, inventory, and sky with a Code Geass theme.
body:
# Code Geass Crystal PvP + Anime Sky by levikk
![1](https://i.imgur.com/PtBETfB.gif)
- Custom GUI
- Totem
- Sky overlay
- Custom sword
- Item textures
- Sounds
- Enchantment Glint
- Crystals

To display the sky, you need one of these mods [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) for Forge or [Skyboxify](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyboxify), [FabricSkyBoxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuit) and [FabricSkyBoxes Interop](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuit-interop) for Fabric
